provenance.method: agent-proposed from disk hints + 5 bounded web checks; human-reviewed

result.name: Birrieria Sinaloa
result.visibility_gap_note: Own site appears first but delivery aggregators (DoorDash, Uber Eats, Grubhub, Postmates) and review-clone sites dominate remaining top results, reducing direct brand authority in agent queries.

classification.name: Birrieria Sinaloa
classification.segment_note: Promoted from mobile-catering after web verification (2026-06-11): indoor dine-in seating + patio + posted Mon–Fri 8am–10pm hours confirm a fixed restaurant. Distinct entity from the enriched Birrieria Sinaloa / La Quinta (51125 Avenida Bermudas). Swept this session.

classification.name: Tacos Ala Mexicana
classification.segment_note: Taquero catering service — web-verified 2026-06-11 (Yelp 'Caterers', WeddingWire 'Wedding Caterers', own site tacosalamexicana.com: corporate/private/wedding events). Caterer, not a fixed restaurant; out of fixed universe.
